CustomField.description: This Checkbox is used by the TimEx App for filtering the icons.
CustomField.formula: OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL( ProjectName__r.ProjectStatus__c , "Open")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Package__r.PackageStatus__c , "Open")), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Package__r.PackageSuperior__c )), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Package__r.PackageSuperior__r.PackageStatus__c,"Open")) ), TimeValidatedProjectResponsible__c =true, TimeValidatedHumanResources__c =true )
CustomField.label: ValNoDelete
